allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Release 1.0.0

- Bump swift-tools-version to 6.0 and minimum platforms to iOS 17 / macOS 14
- Replace SKStoreReviewController with AppStore.requestReview\(in:\)
- Add BundleProviding protocol to enable testability without Bundle subclassing
- Make reviewRequester injectable via init parameter
- Fix App Store review URL to use apps.apple.com/app/id format
- Expand test suite with reviewRequester injection tests and @MainActor at suite level
- Add GitHub Actions CI workflow \(macOS + iOS Simulator jobs\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git tag -a 1.0.0 -m "Release 1.0.0" && git push origin main && git push origin 1.0.0)
